title: Agent answers a multi-property query in one tool call (M60 §6.3 C1)

fixture.prompt: Which pages have status=Draft and tag=research?

dimensions.description: Did the agent call query_pages_by_property (preferred) or compose two find_pages_by_property calls?
Did the agent satisfy the prompt in exactly one tool call?
Result set is exactly {p1} (status=Draft AND tag=research)?
Final answer cites the page title and id, not raw JSON?

_runner_status: TODO — runner ships with T6. JSON shape is the contract.
